introSection: Hurricane is a steel roller coaster at Fun Spot America in Kissimmee, Florida, USA. It previously operated at Celebration City in Missouri and Wild Adventures in Georgia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: At Fun Spot America, a contest was held, asking the public to suggest names for the roller coaster. The name "Hurricane" was selected and the roller coaster opened on December 24, 2019.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Blue track and unpainted supports. This roller coaster is identical to Star Jet at Casino Pier.

fullText:
Hurricane is a steel roller coaster at Fun Spot America in Kissimmee, Florida, USA. It previously operated at Celebration City in Missouri and Wild Adventures in Georgia.

At Fun Spot America, a contest was held, asking the public to suggest names for the roller coaster. The name "Hurricane" was selected and the roller coaster opened on December 24, 2019.

Blue track and unpainted supports. This roller coaster is identical to Star Jet at Casino Pier.
